en: And that makes sense. You'd think after Xbox, there'd be Xbox Two.
And now, after 360, comes Xbox One.
ko: 그리고 이제 360 다음에는 Xbox One이 나와. 왜 One이지?

en: Why one? Maybe that's how many seconds of thought they put in the naming it.
ko: 아마 이름 짓는 데 생각한 시간만큼이 아닐까.

en: Can you get the butter, please? However, with the Xbox One,
I can control my entire entertainment system using voice commands.
Up until now, I've had to use Leonard. Then get the other one.
ko: 지금까지는 레너드를 써야 했어. 그 다음 다른 걸 가져와.

en: I don't feel like you're taking this dilemma seriously.
ko: 네가 이 딜레마를 진지하게 받아들이지 않는 것 같아.

en: Fine, Sheldon. You have my undivided attention.
Okay, now, the PS4 is more angular and sleek-looking.
ko: 자, PS4는 더 각지고 세련된 디자인이야.

en: But the larger size of the Xbox One may keep it from overheating.
ko: 사실이지만, Xbox One의 더 큰 크기가 과열을 방지할 수 있어.

en: Well, you wouldn't want your gaming system to overheat.
No, see, well, you absolutely would not. And furthermore, the Xbox One now comes with a Kinect included.
ko: 아니, 절대 그렇게 되면 안 돼.
